# ANS standards

# (W1994) means withdrawn in 1994
# (R1994) means reaffirmed in 1994
# (ANS.STD. 3) means also known as ANS Standard 3
# (N101.6) or "xxx-Nnnn.yy" means has been adopted as a National Nuclear Standard by ANSI with the identifier ANSI N101.2-1972
# (ASA N6.1) means it has been adopted as a National Standard by ASA (previous name of ANSI) with the identifier ASA N6.1-1964

ANS 1-1972
ANS 1-1975 (R1981)
ANS 1-1987(R1992)
ANS 1-2000 (R2024)
